commands: kubectl get pods -A -o wide 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'backend|api-backend' || echo '(no name match — midas lines)'
kubectl get pods -A -o wide 2>/dev/null | grep -i midas | head -40 || true
kubectl top pods -A 2>&1 | grep -iE 'backend|api-backend' || kubectl top pods -A 2>&1 | head -25
echo '=== describe: OOM / limits / restarts (backend pods) ==='

kubectl get pods -A -o json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.items[] | select(.metadata.name | test("backend|api-backend"; "i")) | [.metadata.namespace,.metadata.name] | @tsv' | while IFS=$'\t' read -r NS POD; do echo "----- $NS/$POD -----"; kubectl describe pod -n "$NS" "$POD" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '^(Name:|Namespace:|    State:|    Last State:|      Reason:|      Exit Code:|    Restart|    Limits:|    Requests:|    memory:|    Memory:|Conditions:|  Normal|  Warning|OOM)' || true; done
kubectl get events -A --sort-by=.lastTimestamp 2>/dev/null | tail -200 | grep -iE 'OOM|Killed|backend|api-backend' | tail -25 || true
